title: CVE-1999-1432 — CVSS 7.5 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-1999-1432

CVSS Score: 7.5 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 1998-07-16T04:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

Power management (Powermanagement) on Solaris 2.4 through 2.6 does not start the xlock process until after the sys-suspend has completed, which allows an attacker with physical access to input characters to the last active application from the keyboard for a short period after the system is restoring, which could lead to increased privileges.

References: http://marc.info/?l=bugtraq&m=90221104525997&w=2, http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/160, http://marc.info/?l=bugtraq&m=90221104525997&w=2
